# opnsense_unbound_acl (Resource)
Manages an Unbound DNS access control list on OPNsense.
## Example Usage
```terraform
resource "opnsense_unbound_acl" "lan" {
  name     = "lan-access"
  action   = "allow"
  networks = "10.0.0.0/8"
}
```
<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the ACL.
- `networks` (String) Networks to apply this ACL to (CIDR notation).

### Optional

- `action` (String) ACL action: `allow`, `deny`, `refuse`, `allow_snoop`, `deny_non_local`, or `refuse_non_local`. Defaults to `allow`.
- `description` (String) Description of the ACL.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this ACL is enabled. Defaults to `true`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) UUID of the ACL in OPNsense.
## Import
```shell
terraform import opnsense_unbound_acl.example 12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012
```
